extensionDescription.message: A lunch and late-night food recommendation tool that uses your local backend and Google Places API key.

backendOffline.message: Local backend is unavailable. Start localhost:3000 first.

locationDisclosure.message: Starting a search sends your location to your own secure localhost backend, then to Google Maps Platform for nearby results.

startPrompt.message: Choose types and budget, then find lunch.

startPromptLunch.message: Choose types and budget, then find lunch.

startPromptLateNight.message: Choose types and budget, then find late-night food.

searchingLateNight.message: Finding late-night food near your location...

cycleReset.message: You have seen this round. Starting again.

unseenResults.message: Showing places you have not seen yet.

pendingChanges.message: Filters changed. Select Recommend again to replace current results.

rankingNotice.message: Results are ordered using distance, everyday-lunch categories, and Google Places data.

rankingNoticeLunch.message: Results are ordered using distance, everyday-lunch categories, and Google Places data.

rankingNoticeLateNight.message: Results are ordered using late-hour confidence, distance, late-night categories, and Google Places data.

errorFallback.message: The backend could not complete this search.

error_MISSING_GOOGLE_PLACES_API_KEY.message: Your local backend is missing a Google Places API key.

error_INVALID_LOCATION_RANGE.message: Location is outside the valid coordinate range.

error_INVALID_CLIENT_ID.message: The local client identifier is invalid.

error_INVALID_FOOD_TYPES.message: One or more food types are invalid.

error_INVALID_PRICE_RANGE_FOR_MODE.message: This price range is not available in late-night mode.

error_INVALID_PRICE_RANGE.message: The selected price range is invalid.

error_DAILY_GOOGLE_QUOTA_REACHED.message: The local daily Google Places limit has been reached.
